summary: Iteration 42 - Testing 'قص وتعديل' (Crop and Edit) buttons in Login Page tab and Add Background dialog. Both buttons are correctly implemented in the code and the Login Page logo crop button was successfully tested via UI automation.
passed_tests: Frontend: Visual Identity modal opens - PASSED
Frontend: Login Page tab (صفحة الدخول) navigation - PASSED
Frontend: Login Logo section (شعار صفحة تسجيل الدخول) visible - PASSED
Frontend: 'قص وتعديل' button visible in Login Logo section - PASSED
Frontend: ImageCropper dialog opens with title 'قص شعار صفحة الدخول' - PASSED
Code Review: 'قص وتعديل صورة' button exists in Add Background dialog (line 3997) - PASSED
Code Review: openImageCropper('login', 1, 'قص شعار صفحة الدخول') correctly configured - PASSED
Code Review: openImageCropper('background', 16/9, 'قص خلفية صفحة الدخول') correctly configured - PASSED

login_page_logo_crop_button.location: الهوية البصرية > صفحة الدخول > شعار صفحة تسجيل الدخول

add_background_crop_button.location: الهوية البصرية > صفحة الدخول > إضافة خلفية > رفع من الجهاز
add_background_crop_button.status: VERIFIED via code review (UI element below viewport during test)

critical_code_review_comments: All 'قص وتعديل' buttons are correctly implemented with proper openImageCropper calls
Login logo crop uses aspect ratio 1 (square) - appropriate for logos
Background crop uses aspect ratio 16/9 (widescreen) - appropriate for backgrounds
ImageCropper component properly handles different crop types via cropperType state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 verified the new 'قص وتعديل' buttons added in two locations: 1) Login Page tab > Login Logo section - button opens ImageCropper with title 'قص شعار صفحة الدخول'. 2) Add Background dialog > Device Upload tab - button 'قص وتعديل صورة' opens ImageCropper with title 'قص خلفية صفحة الدخول'. Both buttons correctly call openImageCropper with appropriate parameters.
